entityName: Love, Chunibyo & Other Delusions! Take on Me

metadata.entityName: Love, Chunibyo & Other Delusions! Take on Me

ingredients.name: Nishiwaki Kita Bypass
ingredients.address: Nishiwaki Kita Byp, Nishiwaki, Hyogo, Japan

ingredients.name: Nakano Sun Mall
ingredients.address: Nakano Sun Mall, サンモール 5 Chome-63-3 Nakano, Nakano City, Tokyo 164-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The covered shopping street in Nakano, Tokyo, where Dekomori is shown visiting shops in the movie as she helps coordinate the gang's efforts to support Rikka. The arcade's lively atmosphere is a backdrop for Tokyo scenes.

ingredients.name: Trading Card Jumbo Akihabara Main Store
ingredients.localName: TCG GATE トレカゲート 秋葉原本店｜ポケモンカード専門店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒101-0021 Tokyo, Chiyoda City, Sotokanda, 4 Chome−7−3 虎ビル 2階 TCG GATE トレカゲート 秋葉原本店｜ポケモンカード専門店

ingredients.name: Busou Shoten
ingredients.address: Busou Shoten, 麻野ビル 3 Chome-15-7 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: An Akihabara hobby shop that appears in the movie as a stop for Dekomori and Nibutani while the other characters travel north. The store's cosplay and costume goods align with the characters' chunibyo aesthetic.

ingredients.name: Chiyoda Kuritsu Rensei Park
ingredients.address: Chidorigafuchi Park, 1 Chome-２ Kojimachi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Chidorigafuchi Park in central Tokyo, shown in the movie during Tokyo scenes involving supporting characters. Its moat-side paths provide a recognizable urban backdrop in the film.

ingredients.name: Haneda Airport
ingredients.address: Haneda Airport (HND), Hanedakuko, Ota City, Tokyo 144-0041, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The airport where Rikka's departure to Scandinavia is planned, driving the central conflict of the movie. Yuuta races against this deadline as he and Rikka travel across Japan to delay the inevitable goodbye.

ingredients.name: Odori Park fountain
ingredients.address: Odori Park fountain, 3 Chome Odorinishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0042, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The fountain in Sapporo's central Odori Park that appears in the movie as the group passes through the city's main boulevard. The landmark fountain is a recognized background in the film's Sapporo sequence.

ingredients.name: Sapporo Station South Square
ingredients.address: Sapporo Station South Square, 4 Chome Kita 5 Jonishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0005, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The front plaza of Sapporo Station where Rikka and Yuuta arrive during their Hokkaido leg of the road trip. The broad open square is documented by fans as one of the Sapporo arrival scenes in the film.

ingredients.name: Gansozushi Haneda Airport Terminal 2 Store
ingredients.localName: 元祖寿司 羽田空港第2ターミナル店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒144-0041 Tokyo, Ota City, Hanedakuko, 3 Chome−4−2 UPPER DECK TOKYO Gansozushi, 第2旅客ターミナル 3F

ingredients.name: THE KNOT SAPPORO
ingredients.localName: THE KNOT SAPPORO（ザ ノット 札幌）
ingredients.address: THE KNOT SAPPORO, 3 Chome-１６-2 Minami 3 Jonishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Sapporo Minami 9 Jonishi 4-chome Store
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 札幌南9条西4丁目店
ingredients.address: 7-Eleven, 4 Chome-2-4 Minami 9 Jonishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 064-0809, Japan

ingredients.name: Public Interest Incorporated Association Hokkaido Trucking Association
ingredients.localName: 公益社団法人 北海道トラック協会
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒064-0809 Hokkaido, Sapporo, Chuo Ward, Minami 9 Jonishi, 1 Chome−1−10 北海道トラック総合研修センター 公益社団法人 北海道トラック協会

ingredients.name: Suishachō
ingredients.address: Suishacho, Toyohira Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 062-0912, Japan

ingredients.name: Nakajima Park
ingredients.address: Nakajima Park, 1 Nakajimakoen, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 064-0931, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A central Sapporo park featured in the movie as Rikka and Yuuta explore the city during their northward journey. The tree-lined paths and pond give the Sapporo scenes their calm, autumnal mood.

ingredients.name: Yakiniku Like Sapporo Tanukiko-ji
ingredients.localName: 焼肉ライク 札幌狸小路店
ingredients.address: Yakiniku Like Sapporo Tanukiko-ji, 金市舘ビル 1F 2 Chome-2 Minami 2 Jonishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0062, Japan

ingredients.name: Miyoshino Tanukikoji
ingredients.localName: みよしの 狸小路店
ingredients.address: Miyoshino Tanukikoji, 2 Chome-16-4 Minami 3 Jonishi, Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: TANUKI KOJI
ingredients.address: Tanukikoji Shopping Street, 南2・3条西1～7丁目 Chuo Ward, Sapporo, Hokkaido 060-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Sapporo's famous covered shopping arcade shown in the movie during the gang's Hokkaido detour. The lively street scene provides background energy as Rikka and Yuuta navigate the city together.

ingredients.name: Hakodate Station
ingredients.address: Hakodate Station, 12 Wakamatsuchō, Hakodate, Hokkaido 040-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The historic terminus that Rikka and Yuuta pass through as they push further north in Hokkaido during the movie. Hakodate's atmospheric old station building appears in transit scenes of the road trip.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Aomori-Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 青森駅前店
ingredients.address: FamilyMart, 1 Chome-1-20 Shinmachi, Aomori, 030-0801, Japan

ingredients.name: Aomori Ekimae Park
ingredients.address: Aomori Ekimae Park, 1 Chome-2-15 Shinmachi, Aomori, 030-0801, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The small park in front of Aomori Station shown in the movie during the characters' arrival in the city. Fan pilgrimage guides list it as a documented background location in the film's Aomori sequence.

ingredients.name: Aomori Airport
ingredients.address: Aomori Airport, Kotani-1-5 Otani, Aomori, 030-0155, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Aomori Airport appears in the movie as part of the travel logistics of the cross-Japan escape, with flights and transport connections framing the urgency of Rikka and Yuuta's race against time.

ingredients.name: Little House Simon
ingredients.localName: りとるはうす しもん

ingredients.name: Nebuta Museum WA RASSE
ingredients.localName: ねぶたの家 ワ･ラッセ
ingredients.address: Nebuta Museum WA RASSE, 1F 1 Chome-1-1 Yasukata, Aomori, 030-0803, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The vibrant Aomori nebuta festival museum near Aomori Station that features in the movie's Aomori city scenes. Its glowing nebuta float displays provide colorful background imagery during the characters' northern stop.

ingredients.name: Seikan Train Ferry Memorial Ship Hakkoda-maru
ingredients.localName: 青函連絡船メモリアルシップ八甲田丸
ingredients.address: Seikan Train Ferry Memorial Ship Hakkōda-maru, 1 Chome-4-１１２−１５ 地先 Yanakawa, Aomori, 038-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The preserved Seikan ferry ship moored in Aomori harbour that appears in the movie as a backdrop during Rikka and Yuuta's time in Aomori. Its historic silhouette is visible in waterfront scenes of the film.

ingredients.name: Staircase Village Road
ingredients.entityContext: The narrow stone staircase road in the Cape Tappi area shown in the movie as Rikka and Yuuta explore the cliffs at the northernmost point of their journey. Fan pilgrims walk this path to retrace the characters' steps.

ingredients.name: NTT East Tappi Telephone Switchboard
ingredients.localName: NTT東日本 竜飛電話交換所
ingredients.address: NTT East Tappi Telephone Switchboard, Minmayatatsuhama, Sotogahama, Higashitsugaru District, Aomori 030-1711, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive red NTT telephone exchange building near Cape Tappi that appears in the background of the movie's Tappi Cape scenes. Its unusual hillside location is a recognized background element documented in pilgrimage guides.

ingredients.name: Tsugaru Kaikyo Fuyugeshiki
ingredients.address: Tsugaru Straits, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Tsugaru Strait visible from Cape Tappi, forming the sweeping seascape backdrop of the movie's emotional climax. Yuuta declares his feelings to Rikka against this view of the waters between Honshu and Hokkaido.

ingredients.name: Kyoto Station
ingredients.address: Higashishiokoji Kamadonocho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The sprawling hub where Rikka and Yuuta begin their impromptu cross-country escape in the movie, slipping away before she is taken to Scandinavia. The departure from this station marks the emotional turning point of the film.

ingredients.name: Kumiko Bench
ingredients.address: Togawa-1-3 Uji, Kyoto 611-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A bench by the Uji River that appears as a pilgrimage spot tied to the Kyoto Animation productions set in Uji, documented by fans who visit to sit where Rikka and Yuuta share quiet moments along the riverbank.

ingredients.name: Fushimi Inari Yotsuji
ingredients.address: 15 Inariyamakanyuchi, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0804, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous four-way intersection partway up Fushimi Inari mountain, shown in the movie during Rikka and Yuuta's Kyoto scenes. Fans climb here to photograph the sweeping torii-lined view that appears in the film.

ingredients.name: Staircase Village Road
ingredients.entityContext: The narrow stone staircase road in the Cape Tappi area shown in the movie as Rikka and Yuuta explore the cliffs at the northernmost point of their journey. Fan pilgrims walk this path to retrace the characters' steps.

ingredients.name: Enjukaigan Camping Ground
ingredients.localName: 美浜町煙樹海岸キャンプ場
ingredients.address: Enjukaigan Camping Ground, 1979-12 Wada, Mihama, Hidaka District, Wakayama 644-0044, Japan

ingredients.name: Near the Shinjuku Piccadilly Cinema
ingredients.address: ピカデリー Ｂ１, ２Ｆ, 3 Chome-15-15 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022, Japan

ingredients.name: Omokaru Stone
ingredients.address: 43 Fukakusa Sekihoji Yamacho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0882, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A wishing stone at Fushimi Inari Taisha featured in the movie as part of Rikka and Yuuta's visit to the shrine. Pilgrims try lifting it while making a wish, mirroring the characters' playful stop here.

ingredients.name: Tofukuin-zaka
ingredients.address: 15 Chome-778 Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0981, Japan

ingredients.name: Tokyo City View
ingredients.localName: 六本木ヒルズ展望台 東京シティビュー
ingredients.address: Roppongi Hills Mori Tower, 52階, 6 Chome-10-1 Roppongi, Minato City, Tokyo 106-0032, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Roppongi Hills observation deck featured in the movie during Tokyo scenes, providing the sweeping city panorama backdrop for character interactions before the road trip begins.

ingredients.name: Yodobashi Camera Multimedia Kyoto
ingredients.localName: ヨドバシカメラ マルチメディア京都
ingredients.address: 地下1階, 590-2 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan

ingredients.name: Uji Bridge
ingredients.address: Uji, Kyoto 611-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The iconic bridge over the Uji River that appears throughout the TV series and movie, closely associated with Rikka and Yuuta's walks in their Uji neighborhood. Fans visit to recreate the atmospheric riverside shots that define the show's setting.

ingredients.name: National highway of stairs Under Side
ingredients.type: ハイキング コース
categories: ハイキング コース
ingredients.address: Sotogahama, Higashitsugaru District, Aomori 030-1711, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous staircase national highway (Route 339) near Cape Tappi that Rikka and Yuuta climb during the movie's climactic Aomori sequence. The stone steps leading up the cliff are among the most-photographed pilgrimage spots tied to the film.

ingredients.name: Aomori Station
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-1 Yanakawa, Aomori, 038-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The gateway station to Aomori city where Rikka and Yuuta continue their northward escape in the movie. Fan pilgrims visit to mark the same stop on the characters' cross-Japan journey.

ingredients.name: Cape Tappi
ingredients.address: Minmayatatsuhama, Sotogahama, Higashitsugaru District, Aomori 030-1711, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The windswept northernmost tip of Honshu where Rikka and Yuuta reach the dramatic endpoint of their road trip in the movie. Standing at the cape looking out at the Tsugaru Strait is the emotional climax of their journey together, making it the most iconic pilgrimage stop for fans of the film.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Tower
ingredients.address: Tokyo Tower, 4 Chome-2-8 Shibakoen, Minato City, Tokyo 105-0011
ingredients.entityContext: Tokyo Tower appears in the movie as a background landmark during Tokyo sequences, visible in wide cityscape shots as the story cuts between Rikka and Yuuta's journey and events back in the city.

ingredients.name: Karahashi Park
ingredients.address: Karahashi Park, 1 Chome-27 Seta, Otsu, Shiga 520-2134, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A park near the Seta River in Otsu, Shiga, that appears in the movie as the gang's home region is shown. Located close to the Uji and Lake Biwa area central to the TV series, it is documented in pilgrimage records for the film.

ingredients.name: Keihan-Ishiyama Station
ingredients.address: Keihan-Ishiyama Station, 2 Awazuchō, Otsu, Shiga 520-0832, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A station on the Keihan Ishiyama Sakamoto Line near the gang's home territory in Shiga, documented as a background location for the movie's scenes set in the Otsu and Lake Biwa area.

ingredients.name: Kaigake Elementary School
ingredients.localName: しゃくなげ学校(旧鎌掛小学校)
ingredients.address: Kaigake Elementary School, 2362 Kaigake, Hino, Gamo District, Shiga 529-1631, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive old wooden school building in Hino, Shiga, that appears in the movie as a countryside backdrop during travel sequences through the Shiga region. Its heritage building character makes it a recognized background shot in the film.

ingredients.name: Hyotei
ingredients.address: Hyotei, 35 Nanzenji Kusakawacho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8437, Japan

ingredients.name: Maison des Délices
ingredients.localName: メゾン・セ・デリシウ

ingredients.name: DELTA Bistro, Coffee Shop & Gallery by KYOTOGRAPHIE
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒602-0826 Kyoto, Kamigyo Ward, Saneicho, 62 DELTA Bistro, Coffee Shop & Gallery by KYOTOGRAPHIE

ingredients.name: Nidec Kyoto Tower
ingredients.address: Nidec Kyoto Tower, 721-1 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive tower visible from Kyoto Station that appears in establishing shots of Kyoto during the movie. It serves as a visual anchor for the Kyoto sequences framing the characters' farewell journey.

ingredients.localName: 京進の大学受験TOPΣ 京都駅前校
ingredients.address: Kyoshin TOP∑ Kyoto Station, 685 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan

ingredients.address: Country House Eikokuya, ジェイアール京都伊勢丹 3F 657 Higashishiokojicho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8216, Japan
